owning_subsystem: enterprise/meteorological_intelligence, schemas weather contracts/events, services/meteorological-service, workflows/weather_ingestion, platform/sdk, ui weather app, docs, testing, and plans
non_goals: Do not add direct ui-to-services imports or direct ui-to-SurrealDB access.
Do not enable live-network weather dependencies in default CI or local verification.
Do not extend finance-service mutation paths or unrelated non-weather domains in this issue.
scope_in: Add the meteorological_intelligence enterprise domain metadata and supporting ADR/docs.
Add versioned weather contracts, events, and SurrealDB metadata record catalogs.
Add the meteorological-service crate with fixture-backed ingest, provenance, view products, and map-scene delivery surfaces.
Add the weather_ingestion workflow as the approved mutation path for ingest and backfill.
Extend platform/sdk with typed weather query and snapshot surfaces.
Register and integrate the governed weather app in ui/ without bypassing platform contracts.
Add read-only weather consumers in knowledge-service and quant-research-service.
Add the required execution artifacts and validation evidence for this multi-plane change.
scope_out: Authenticated or live external connectors beyond the NOAA-first fixture-backed path.
Production infrastructure rollout changes outside existing repository conventions.
Dynamic plugin loading or unrelated platform-shell redesign.
acceptance_criteria: The repository contains a governed meteorological_intelligence domain with ontology, ownership, evidence, and service-boundary metadata.
Weather contracts, events, and schema/codegen coverage compile and validate successfully.
meteorological-service and weather_ingestion provide deterministic fixture-backed weather ingest and projection behavior.
platform/sdk and ui expose the governed weather capability only through typed contracts.
knowledge-service and quant-research-service consume weather products read-only.
The required multi-plane execution artifacts exist under plans/121-meteorological-intelligence/.
Canonical local validation passes on the current PR head.
validation_commands: cargo xtask github validate-execution-artifacts --issue-id 121 --branch feature/121-meteorological-intelligence --risk-class high
validation_artifacts: Passing workspace clippy and test output on the rebased PR head
Passing cargo verify-repo, cargo xtask verify profile ui, and cargo xtask ui-hardening output
GitHub workflow re-enable evidence for CI, Governance, and Security so PR checks can surface again
rollback_path: Revert the meteorological domain, schema, service, workflow, SDK, UI, fixture, documentation, and execution-artifact changes together so the repository returns to the prior non-weather baseline without hybrid drift.
